intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 8:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 75% FTP, Seated. 8:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 95% for 5:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 95% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/5. 5:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 95% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. You're 37% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. 105% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're building something real here. 4 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. 105% at 82-90 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 20 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 53% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 110% for 3:00. Next up: 2:00 recovery, then 2min at 120%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 53% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 53% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. 110% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/6. 65% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4 of 6. Target: 120% FTP, 95-105 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% through. This is your workout. Own it. 120% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65% into session. 120%, 95-105 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 69% done. 0 intervals left. 11 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 69% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% done. 1 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 74% done. 1 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5/6. 32 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 74% into session. 135%, 95-105 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% for 5:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 60%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5:00 at 60%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 5 minutes to go. Easy does it. 60% FTP. Build your engine.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 38 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 88% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
